zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Knight Mathew Goch於1386年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾萊可哈姆時，他的父親David Gough35歲，母親Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell19歲。他和Margred Rhys Moethe Verch至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1450年7月4日在英國英格蘭倫敦布倫登享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Knight Mathew Goch于1386年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾萊可哈姆时，他的父亲David Gough35岁，母亲Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell19岁。他和Margred Rhys Moethe Verch至少有9个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1450年7月4日在英国英格兰倫敦布倫登享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Pawel, Zuzanna, Zygmunt.
North German: habitational name from any of various minor places which get their names from an ancient Germanic element goch, gog ‘marsh, bog, fen’.
Polish: from a pet form of various personal names beginning with Go-, such as Gościsław.

variants.name: Gotch
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh coch, goch ‘red(-haired)’; see Gooch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: Mathew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Knight Mathew Goch was born in 1386, in Wrexham, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, David Gough, was 35 and his mother, Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell, was 19. He had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Margred Rhys Moethe Verch. He died on 4 July 1450, in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Knight Mathew Goch est né en 1386, à Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Gough, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Margred Rhys Moethe Verch. Il est décédé le 4 juillet 1450, à Blendon, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Knight Mathew Goch 1386 in Wrexham, Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Gough 35 und seine Mutter Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell 19. Er hatte mit Margred Rhys Moethe Verch mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Juli 1450 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Blendon, London, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Knight Mathew Goch(이)가 1386년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르 레스함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Gough(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Margred Rhys Moethe Verch(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 7월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 블렌던에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
